name: easy-loop
description: A Stop-hook powered Easy Loop for Codex CLI that keeps retrying the same task until a promise or iteration limit is reached.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Easy Loop inside Codex using a Stop hook, persistent task state, and repeatable completion conditions.
defaultPrompt: Use Easy Loop only after first checking the current session state when it already exists, and ask for only the missing setup details.
If starting a loop, show a startup draft first, require the literal word confirm, and do not call setup.sh before that confirmation.

Keep response shapes stable: bare $easy-loop should become an action picker or status, status replies should start with Current status:, cancel replies should start with I ran:, and activation replies should include state.md, iterations.jsonl, max-iterations, and the completion promise.
